subject: Re: Bell 407 training
body:
cal whn you land , and check


----- Original Message ----
From: "LVJET@aol.com" <LVJET@aol.com>
To: JEEPROJECT@YAHOO.COM
Sent: Saturday, July 7, 2007 9:42:34 PM
Subject: Bell 407 training


Jeffrey,
do you want me to put dual controls and bring 407 to LSJ for a helicopter lesson for you?
 I thought we would go to St. Thomas airport and work on hovering and traffic patterns.
I land via the airlines at 3pm Sunday, I could be at LSJ by 4pm if you like,
please advise,
Larry V,.






See what's free at AOL.com.
